request.complaint: I sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

response.agent_summary: Customer is requesting a reversal for a 2000 BDT transfer (TXN-9202) sent to a counterparty they have transacted with previously. The claim of a 'wrong person' is inconsistent with the established transaction history.
response.recommended_next_action: Flag the ticket for manual review by the dispute resolution team to verify the claim and check if the recipient has already withdrawn the funds.
response.customer_reply: We understand your concern regarding the recent transaction. Please be advised that we have initiated a review of your request, and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels if the transaction is found to be erroneous. We will notify you once the investigation is complete.

request.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today...

response.agent_summary: The customer has reported a wrong transfer of 5000 taka to an incorrect number, which is confirmed by the transaction history as TXN-9101. The case requires human review and is categorized as a high-severity dispute resolution case.
response.recommended_next_action: The agent should initiate the dispute resolution process and request additional information from the customer to verify the incorrect transfer. The agent should also review the transaction history and relevant evidence to determine the next steps.
response.customer_reply: We apologize for the inconvenience you've experienced with the wrong transfer. We are looking into this matter and will take necessary steps to resolve the issue. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels, and we will keep you updated on the progress.
